# anabesouza.github.
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Exchange</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --deep-purple: #461778;
    --dark-blue: #0F172A;
    --lavender: #C4B5FD;
    --soft-white: #F8FAFC;
    --accent: #06b6d4;
    --purple-mid: #7C3AED;
    --purple-light: #EEF2FF;
    --text-muted: #94A3B8;
    --orange: #f97316;
    --border: rgba(196, 181, 253, 0.2);
  }

  *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    background: var(--dark-blue);
    color: var(--soft-white);
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    cursor: none;
  }

  /* Custom cursor */
  .cursor {
    width: 10px; height: 10px;
    background: var(--accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    transition: transform 0.1s ease;
    mix-blend-mode: screen;
  }

  body:hover .cursor { transform: scale(1); }

  /* NAV */
  nav {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    z-index: 1000;
    padding: 0 5%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    height: 72px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
    transition: all 0.4s ease;
  }
  nav.scrolled {
    background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border-bottom-color: var(--border);
  }

  .nav-logo {
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 22px;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: var(--soft-white);
  }
  .nav-logo-icon {
    width: 36px; height: 36px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple-mid), var(--accent));
    border-radius: 10px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 18px;
  }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 2px;
    list-style: none;
  }
  .nav-links a {
    color: var(--text-muted);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 400;
    padding: 8px 16px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    cursor: none;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover, .nav-links a.active {
    color: var(--soft-white);
    background: rgba(196, 181, 253, 0.08);
  }
  .nav-links a.active { color: var(--accent); }

  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--deep-purple);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--soft-white) !important;
    border-radius: 10px !important;
    padding: 9px 20px !important;
    font-weight: 500 !important;
    transition: all 0.2s !important;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover {
    background: var(--purple-mid) !important;
    border-color: var(--purple-mid) !important;
  }

  /* SECTIONS */
  section {
    display: none;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: 120px 5% 80px;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.5s ease forwards;
  }
  section.active { display: block; }

  @keyframes fadeInUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  /* HERO */
  .hero {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-orb {
    position: absolute;
    border-radius: 50%;
    filter: blur(80px);
    opacity: 0.18;
  }
  .orb1 { width: 600px; height: 600px; background: var(--purple-mid); top: -200px; left: -200px; }
  .orb2 { width: 400px; height: 400px; background: var(--accent); top: 100px; right: -100px; }
  .orb3 { width: 300px; height: 300px; background: var(--lavender); bottom: 0; left: 40%; }

  .hero-tag {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.25);
    color: var(--accent);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 8px 18px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    animation: pulse 3s ease infinite;
  }
  @keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(34,211,238,0.15); }
    50% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 8px rgba(34,211,238,0); }
  }

  .hero-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; background: var(--accent); border-radius: 50%; }

  h1 {
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(42px, 6vw, 86px);
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.05;
    letter-spacing: -2px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    position: relative;
  }
  h1 .accent-text {
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--lavender), var(--accent));
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
  }

  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 18px;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    max-width: 560px;
    margin: 0 auto 48px;
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.8;
  }

  .hero-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    margin-bottom: 80px;
  }

  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--purple-mid);
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    padding: 15px 32px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    cursor: none;
    transition: all 0.25s;
    text-decoration: none;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover {
    background: #6D28D9;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.4);
  }

  .btn-outline {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--soft-white);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 15px 32px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 400;
    cursor: none;
    transition: all 0.25s;
    text-decoration: none;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover {
    border-color: var(--lavender);
    color: var(--lavender);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }

  /* Phone mockup */
  .phone-showcase {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 24px;
    margin-top: 20px;
  }

  .phone-frame {
    width: 220px;
    height: 440px;
    background: #0F172A;
    border-radius: 36px;
    border: 6px solid #1E293B;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
    box-shadow: 0 40px 100px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .phone-frame.center {
    transform: translateY(-30px) scale(1.08);
    z-index: 2;
    border-color: var(--deep-purple);
    box-shadow: 0 50px 120px rgba(124,58,237,0.4), 0 0 0 1px rgba(196,181,253,0.2);
  }
  .phone-frame.side { opacity: 0.6; }
  .phone-notch {
    position: absolute;
    top: 10px;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 70px;
    height: 6px;
    background: #1E293B;
    border-radius: 3px;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  /* Screen content */
.phone-screen-img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}

.phone-frame {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.phone-notch {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  z-index: 10; 
}

  /* STATS ROW */
  .stats-row {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 60px;
    padding: 60px 5%;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    margin: 80px 0 0;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .stat-item { text-align: center; }
  .stat-num {
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 42px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: -2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--lavender), var(--accent));
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
  }
  .stat-label { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 300; }

  /* FEATURES */
  .features-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 20px;
    margin-top: 60px;
  }
  .feat-card {
    background: rgba(30, 27, 75, 0.4);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 28px;
    transition: all 0.3s;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .feat-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--purple-mid), transparent);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.3s;
  }
  .feat-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: rgba(196,181,253,0.4); }
  .feat-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; }
  .feat-icon {
    width: 48px; height: 48px;
    background: rgba(124,58,237,0.15);
    border-radius: 14px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.2);
  }
  .feat-icon svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; stroke: var(--lavender); }
  .feat-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 17px;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    color: var(--soft-white);
  }
  .feat-card p { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; font-weight: 300; }

  /* PAGE HEADINGS */
  .page-heading {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .page-heading .section-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    color: var(--accent);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .page-heading h2 {
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(30px, 4vw, 52px);
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: -1.5px;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .page-heading p {
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 300;
    max-width: 540px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    line-height: 1.8;
  }

  /* IDENTITY PAGE */
  .identity-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 20px;
    margin-top: 60px;
  }
  @media (max-width: 768px) { .identity-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

  .id-card {
    background: rgba(30,27,75,0.35);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 32px;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .id-card:hover { border-color: rgba(196,181,253,0.4); }
  .id-card.wide { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
  .id-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .color-swatches {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .swatch {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 8px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .swatch-dot {
    width: 56px; height: 56px;
    border-radius: 16px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    transition: transform 0.2s;
    cursor: none;
  }
  .swatch-dot:hover { transform: scale(1.08); }
  .swatch span { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-muted); font-family: monospace; }
  .swatch strong { font-size: 11px; color: var(--soft-white); font-weight: 500; }

  .type-showcase { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }
  .type-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 16px; }
  .type-label { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 11px; min-width: 80px; }
  .type-sample-title {
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    color: var(--soft-white);
  }
  .type-sample-body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--text-muted);
  }
  .type-sample-ui {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--lavender);
    letter-spacing: 0.3px;
  }

  /* LOGO PAGE */
  .logo-display {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 50px;
    margin-top: 60px;
  }
  .logo-main {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 30px;
  }
  .logo-symbol {
    width: 120px; height: 120px;
    background: var(--deep-purple);
    border-radius: 32px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all 0.3s;
    cursor: none;
  }
  .logo-symbol::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(124,58,237,0.3), rgba(34,211,238,0.1));
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.3s;
  }
  .logo-symbol:hover::before { opacity: 1; }
  .logo-symbol:hover { transform: scale(1.04); box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(124,58,237,0.3); }

  .logo-wordmark {
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 52px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: -3px;
    color: var(--soft-white);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 4px;
  }
  .logo-wordmark span { color: var(--accent); }

  .logo-variants {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 20px;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 800px;
  }
  .logo-var-card {
    border-radius: 18px;
    padding: 32px 20px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    transition: all 0.3s;
    cursor: none;
  }
  .logo-var-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); }
  .logo-var-card p { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }

  .logo-dark { background: rgba(30,27,75,0.4); }
  .logo-light { background: #F8FAFC; }
  .logo-light .logo-wordmark { color: var(--deep-purple); }
  .logo-purple { background: var(--purple-mid); }

  /* DOWNLOAD PAGE */
  .download-hero {
    text-align: center;
    padding-top: 20px;
  }
  .app-icon-large {
    width: 120px; height: 120px;
    background: var(--deep-purple);
    border-radius: 30px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(196,181,253,0.3);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    margin: 0 auto 28px;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(124,58,237,0.35);
    font-size: 52px;
    transition: all 0.4s;
    cursor: none;
  }
  .app-icon-large:hover {
    transform: rotate(-5deg) scale(1.05);
    box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(124,58,237,0.5);
  }

  .download-cards {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 20px;
    max-width: 720px;
    margin: 60px auto 0;
  }
  @media (max-width: 600px) { .download-cards { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

  .dl-card {
    background: rgba(30,27,75,0.4);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 22px;
    padding: 36px 28px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    text-align: center;
    gap: 14px;
    transition: all 0.3s;
    cursor: none;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .dl-card::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 3px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--purple-mid), var(--accent));
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.3s;
  }
  .dl-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); border-color: rgba(196,181,253,0.4); }
  .dl-card:hover::after { opacity: 1; }
  .dl-card h3 { font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; }
  .dl-card p { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 300; }
  .dl-icon { font-size: 42px; }

  .dl-btn {
    background: var(--deep-purple);
    color: var(--soft-white);
    border: 1px solid rgba(196,181,253,0.25);
    padding: 13px 28px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 500;
    cursor: none;
    transition: all 0.25s;
    text-decoration: none;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    width: 100%;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-top: 6px;
  }
  .dl-btn:hover {
    background: var(--purple-mid);
    border-color: var(--purple-mid);
    transform: scale(1.02);
  }

  .dl-badge {
    background: rgba(34,211,238,0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(34,211,238,0.25);
    color: var(--accent);
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 1.2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 4px 12px;
    border-radius: 100px;
  }

  .qr-area {
    margin-top: 50px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 40px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .qr-card {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
  }
  .qr-box {
    width: 110px; height: 110px;
    background: var(--soft-white);
    border-radius: 16px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 10px;
  }
  .qr-placeholder {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 2px;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
  }
  .qr-placeholder span {
    border-radius: 1px;
  }
  .qr-card p { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12px; }

  /* SCROLLBAR */
  ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--dark-blue); }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--deep-purple); border-radius: 3px; }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 40px 5%;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 300;
  }
  footer strong { color: var(--lavender); font-weight: 500; }

  /* Noise overlay */
  .noise {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9990;
    opacity: 0.025;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='1'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
  }

  /* Grid line bg */
  .grid-bg {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(196,181,253,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(196,181,253,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
  }

  section > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; }

  /* Floating particles */
  .particles {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .particle {
    position: absolute;
    width: 2px; height: 2px;
    background: var(--accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: float 8s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes float {
    0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(100vh) scale(0); }
    10% { opacity: 0.6; }
    90% { opacity: 0.3; }
    100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-10vh) scale(1.5); }
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    nav { padding: 0 20px; }
    section { padding: 100px 20px 60px; }
    .phone-showcase { gap: 10px; }
    .phone-frame { width: 160px; height: 320px; }
    .phone-frame.side { display: none; }
    .logo-variants { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .stats-row { gap: 30px; }
    nav .nav-links { display: none; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="cursor" id="cursor"></div>
<div class="cursor-ring" id="cursorRing"></div>
<div class="noise"></div>
<div class="grid-bg"></div>
<div class="particles" id="particles"></div>

<nav id="navbar">
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo" onclick="showSection('home'); return false;">
    <img src="Designer.png" alt="Exchange" style="height:180px; width:auto; object-fit:contain;">
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('home'); return false;" id="nav-home" class="active">Início</a></li>
    <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('sobre'); return false;" id="nav-sobre">Sobre</a></li>
    <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('identidade'); return false;" id="nav-identidade">Identidade Visual</a></li>
    <li><a href="#" onclick="showSection('download'); return false;" id="nav-download" class="nav-cta">Download</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HOME -->
<section id="home" class="active">
  <div class="hero">
    <div class="hero-bg">
      <div class="hero-orb orb1"></div>
      <div class="hero-orb orb2"></div>
      <div class="hero-orb orb3"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-tag">
      <div class="hero-dot"></div>
      Intercâmbio para todos
    </div>

    <h1>
      Explore o mundo<br>
      com <span class="accent-text">segurança</span> e<br>
      <span class="accent-text">pertencimento</span>
    </h1>

    <p class="hero-sub">
      O Exchange é o app que acompanha você em toda a jornada. <br>
      Do planejamento à chegada, da adaptação aos aprendizados que mudam vidas.
    </p>

    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a href="#" class="btn-primary" onclick="showSection('download'); return false;">
        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg>
        Baixar o app
      </a>
      <a href="#" class="btn-outline" onclick="showSection('sobre'); return false;">
        Conhecer →
      </a>
    </div>

   <div class="phone-showcase">
  
  <div class="phone-frame side">
    <div class="phone-notch"></div>
    <img src="menu.png" alt="Tela Mural" class="phone-screen-img">
  </div>

  <div class="phone-frame center">
    <div class="phone-notch"></div>
    <img src="home.png" alt="Tela Principal" class="phone-screen-img">
  </div>

  <div class="phone-frame side">
    <div class="phone-notch"></div>
    <img src="painel.png" alt="Tela Instituições" class="phone-screen-img">
  </div>

</div>
    <div class="stats-row">
      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-num" id="stat1">0</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Intercambistas ativos</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-num" id="stat2">0</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Países conectados</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-item">
        <div class="stat-num" id="stat3">0</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Instituições parceiras</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SOBRE -->
<section id="sobre">
  <div class="page-heading">
    <div class="section-tag">O que é o Exchange?</div>
    <h2>Mais do que um aplicativo<br>Um copiloto para seu sonho</h2>
    <p>Do planejamento à chegada, da adaptação ao aprendizado. <br>
      O Exchange está com você em cada etapa do intercâmbio.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="features-grid">
  
  <div class="feat-card">
    <div class="feat-icon">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M14.5 10c-.83 0-1.5-.67-1.5-1.5v-5c0-.83.67-1.5 1.5-1.5s1.5.67 1.5 1.5v5c0 .83-.67 1.5-1.5 1.5z"/><path d="M20.5 10H19V8.5c0-.83.67-1.5 1.5-1.5s1.5.67 1.5 1.5-.67 1.5-1.5 1.5z"/><path d="M9.5 14c.83 0 1.5.67 1.5 1.5v5c0 .83-.67 1.5-1.5 1.5S8 21.33 8 20.5v-5c0-.83.67-1.5 1.5-1.5z"/><path d="M3.5 14H5v1.5c0 .83-.67 1.5-1.5 1.5S2 16.33 2 15.5 2.67 14 3.5 14z"/><path d="M14 14.5c0-.83.67-1.5 1.5-1.5h5c.83 0 1.5.67 1.5 1.5s-.67 1.5-1.5 1.5h-5c-.83 0-1.5-.67-1.5-1.5z"/><path d="M15.5 19H14v1.5c0 .83.67 1.5 1.5 1.5s1.5-.67 1.5-1.5-.67-1.5-1.5-1.5z"/><path d="M10 9.5C10 8.67 9.33 8 8.5 8h-5C2.67 8 2 8.67 2 9.5S2.67 11 3.5 11h5c.83 0 1.5-.67 1.5-1.5z"/><path d="M8.5 5H10V3.5C10 2.67 9.33 2 8.5 2S7 2.67 7 3.5 7.67 5 8.5 5z"/></svg>
    </div>
    <h3>Planejamento completo</h3>
    <p>Organize documentos, tarefas e prazos em um só lugar. Checklists inteligentes que avisam você antes do prazo acabar.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="feat-card">
    <div class="feat-icon">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="2" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg>
    </div>
    <h3>Adaptação cultural</h3>
    <p>Guias de adaptação por país, dicas de cultura local, idioma e como navegar a burocracia no destino.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="feat-card">
    <div class="feat-icon">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M22 10v6M2 10l10-5 10 5-10 5z"/><path d="M6 12v5c3 3 9 3 12 0v-5"/></svg>
    </div>
    <h3>Rede de instituições</h3>
    <p>Acesso direto a informações das universidades parceiras, editais abertos e vagas disponíveis por destino.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="feat-card">
    <div class="feat-icon">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>
    </div>
    <h3>Segurança e suporte</h3>
    <p>Contatos de emergência, suporte ao intercambista e notificações de segurança no país de destino.</p>
  </div>

</div>
</section>
<!-- IDENTIDADE VISUAL -->
<section id="identidade">
  <div class="page-heading">
    <div class="section-tag">Identidade Visual</div>
    <h2>Design que transmite<br>confiança e conexão</h2>
    <p>Cada cor, fonte e elemento foi pensado para comunicar tecnologia, pertencimento e o espírito de explorar o mundo.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="identity-grid">
   <div class="id-card wide">
  <h3>Paleta de cores</h3>
  <div class="color-swatches">
    
    <div class="swatch">
      <div class="swatch-dot" style="background:#7C3AED;" title="#7C3AED"></div>
      <strong>Vivid Purple</strong>
      <span>#7C3AED</span>
    </div>

    <div class="swatch">
      <div class="swatch-dot" style="background:#461778;" title="#461778"></div>
      <strong>Deep Purple</strong>
      <span>#461778</span>
    </div>

    <div class="swatch">
      <div class="swatch-dot" style="background:#06B6D4;" title="#06B6D4"></div>
      <strong>Travel Turquoise</strong>
      <span>#06B6D4</span>
    </div>

    <div class="swatch">
      <div class="swatch-dot" style="background:#F97316;" title="#F97316"></div>
      <strong>Adventure Orange</strong>
      <span>#F97316</span>
    </div>

    <div class="swatch">
      <div class="swatch-dot" style="background:#F8F7FC; border-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.1);" title="#F8F7FC"></div>
      <strong>Lilac White</strong>
      <span>#F8F7FC</span>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
<div class="id-card wide">
  <h3>Logo e Ícone do Aplicativo</h3>

  <div style="
    display:flex;
    gap:40px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    justify-content:center;
    align-items:center;
    margin-top:20px;
  ">

    <div style="text-align:center;">
      <div style="
        background:var(--deep-purple);
        padding:20px;
        border-radius:20px;
        margin-bottom:12px;
      ">
        <img src="Designer.png"
             alt="Logo Exchange"
             style="max-width:320px; height:auto;">
      </div>

      <p style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:13px;">
        Logotipo principal
      </p>
    </div>

    <div style="text-align:center;">
      <div style="
        width:150px;
        height:150px;
        background:white;
        border-radius:30px;
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        justify-content:center;
        margin:0 auto 12px;
        border:1px solid var(--border);
      ">
        <img src="app-icon.jpg"
             alt="Ícone do App"
             style="width:110px; height:110px; object-fit:contain;">
      </div>

      <p style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:13px;">
        Ícone do aplicativo
      </p>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

    <!-- Tipografia -->
    <div class="id-card">
      <h3>Tipografia</h3>
      <div class="type-showcase">
        <div class="type-row">
          <span class="type-label">Display</span>
          <span class="type-sample-title">Poppins 800</span>
        </div>
        <div style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:13px; font-weight:300; padding-left:96px; margin-top:-8px;">Títulos, headings, logo — moderno, geométrico e marcante</div>
        <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border); padding-top:16px;">
          <div class="type-row">
            <span class="type-label">Body</span>
            <span class="type-sample-body">DM Sans 400</span>
          </div>
          <div style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:13px; font-weight:300; padding-left:96px; margin-top:-4px;">Textos, parágrafos — humanista, legível, amigável</div>
        </div>
        <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border); padding-top:16px;">
          <div class="type-row">
            <span class="type-label">UI Labels</span>
            <span class="type-sample-ui">DM Sans 500</span>
          </div>
          <div style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:13px; font-weight:300; padding-left:96px; margin-top:-4px;">Botões, labels, badges — semibold para clareza</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

   <div class="id-card">
  <h3>Conceito Visual</h3>
  <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:14px;">
    
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:12px;">
      <div style="width:28px; height:28px; background:rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.12); border-radius:8px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-shrink:0; font-size:14px; margin-top:2px;">🌍</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-weight:500; font-size:14px; margin-bottom:3px;">Conexão Global</div>
        <div style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:13px; font-weight:300;">Elementos que remetem à liberdade de viajar e à união entre diferentes culturas.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:12px;">
      <div style="width:28px; height:28px; background:rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.12); border-radius:8px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-shrink:0; font-size:14px; margin-top:2px;">🧭</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-weight:500; font-size:14px; margin-bottom:3px;">Descoberta & Aventura</div>
        <div style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:13px; font-weight:300;">Estímulo visual focado na busca por novas oportunidades e no desejo de explorar o mundo.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:12px;">
      <div style="width:28px; height:28px; background:rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.12); border-radius:8px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-shrink:0; font-size:14px; margin-top:2px;">🚀</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-weight:500; font-size:14px; margin-bottom:3px;">Inovação Criativa</div>
        <div style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:13px; font-weight:300;">A fusão de roxos expressa o ecossistema tecnológico e criativo da plataforma.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:12px;">
      <div style="width:28px; height:28px; background:rgba(70, 23, 120, 0.12); border-radius:8px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-shrink:0; font-size:14px; margin-top:2px;">🌱</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-weight:500; font-size:14px; margin-bottom:3px;">Crescimento Pessoal</div>
        <div style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:13px; font-weight:300;">Interface fluida e acolhedora que acompanha e simplifica a evolução da jornada do intercambista.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- LOGOTIPO -->
<section id="logotipo">
  <div class="page-heading">
    <div class="section-tag">Logotipo</div>
    <h2>Uma marca que<br>conta histórias</h2>
    <p>Símbolo de exploração, tecnologia e conexão humana — presente em cada tela do app.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="logo-display">
    <div class="logo-main">
      <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.96); border-radius:24px; padding:28px 40px; border:1px solid var(--border); box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); transition:all 0.3s; cursor:none;" onmouseenter="this.style.transform='scale(1.03)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 30px 80px rgba(124,58,237,0.3)'" onmouseleave="this.style.transform='scale(1)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Exchange Logo" style="height:100px; width:auto; display:block;">
      </div>
      <p style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:14px; font-weight:300; max-width:440px; text-align:center; margin-top:10px;">Globo com avião orbital — símbolo de movimento, exploração e conexão entre intercambistas ao redor do mundo.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="logo-variants">
      <div class="logo-var-card logo-dark">
        <div style="background:rgba(30,27,75,0.8); border-radius:14px; padding:14px 20px;">
          <img src=Designer.png alt="Descrição" width="120" height="80">
        </div>
        <span style="font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:-0.5px;">Versão monocromática clara</span>
        <p>Para fundos escuros</p>
      </div>
      <div class="logo-var-card logo-light">
        <div style="background:#fff; border-radius:14px; padding:14px 20px;">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Exchange" style="height:52px; width:auto; display:block;">
        </div>
        <span style="font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:-0.5px; color:#1E1B4B;">Versão colorida</span>
        <p style="color:#9CA3AF;">Para fundos claros</p>
      </div>
      <div class="logo-var-card logo-purple">
        <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius:14px; padding:14px 20px;">
          <img src=Designer.png alt="Descrição" width="120" height="80">
        </div>
        <span style="font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:-0.5px;">Versão monocromática</span>
        <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">Para fundos roxos</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Ícone grid -->
    <div style="width:100%; max-width:700px; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:20px; padding:32px; background:rgba(30,27,75,0.3);">
      <h3 style="font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif; font-size:15px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-muted); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1.5px; margin-bottom:24px;">Ícone do App — Variações</h3>
      <div style="display:flex; gap:20px; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:flex-end;">
        <div style="width:100px; height:100px; background:#fff; border-radius:26px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; border:1px solid rgba(196,181,253,0.2); padding:10px;">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:contain;">
        </div>
        <div style="width:76px; height:76px; background:#fff; border-radius:20px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; border:1px solid rgba(196,181,253,0.2); padding:8px;">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:contain;">
        </div>
        <div style="width:56px; height:56px; background:#fff; border-radius:14px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; border:1px solid rgba(196,181,253,0.2); padding:6px;">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:contain;">
        </div>
        <div style="width:40px; height:40px; background:#fff; border-radius:10px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; border:1px solid rgba(196,181,253,0.2); padding:5px;">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:contain;">
        </div>
        <div style="width:28px; height:28px; background:#fff; border-radius:7px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; border:1px solid rgba(196,181,253,0.2); padding:3px;">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:contain;">
        </div>
        <p style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; align-self:center; margin-left:10px;">100px · 76px · 56px · 40px · 28px</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- DOWNLOAD -->
<section id="download">
  <div class="page-heading">
    <div class="section-tag">Download</div>
    <h2>Comece sua jornada<br>agora mesmo</h2>
    <p>Disponível para Android. Em breve também para IOS, cadastre-se para ser um dos primeiros a experimentar.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="download-hero">
    <div class="app-icon-large" style="overflow:hidden; padding:0; background:#fff;">
      <img src="app-icon.jpg" alt="Exchange" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:contain; padding:14px;">
    </div>

    <div class="download-cards">
      <div class="dl-card">
        <div class="dl-icon">🍎</div>
        <h3>App Store</h3>
        <div class="dl-badge">Em breve</div>
        <p>iOS 15+ · iPhone e iPad</p>
        <a href="#" class="dl-btn">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg>
          Pré-cadastro
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="dl-card">
  <div class="dl-icon">🤖</div>
  <h3>Android APK</h3>
  <div class="dl-badge">Disponível</div>
  <p>Android 9+ · smartphones</p>

  <a href="app-release.apk" download class="dl-btn">
    <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
      <path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/>
      <polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/>
      <line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/>
    </svg>
    Baixar APK
  </a>
</div>
    </div>

    <!-- Email capture -->
    <div style="max-width:500px; margin:50px auto 0; text-align:center;">
      <p style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:14px; margin-bottom:20px;">Seja notificado assim que o app estiver disponível</p>
      <div style="display:flex; gap:10px; background:rgba(30,27,75,0.5); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:14px; padding:8px; max-width:460px; margin:0 auto;">
        <input type="email" id="emailInput" placeholder="seu@email.com" style="flex:1; background:transparent; border:none; color:var(--soft-white); font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:14px; padding:8px 12px; outline:none; cursor:text;" />
        <button onclick="handleSubscribe()" style="background:var(--purple-mid); color:#fff; border:none; padding:10px 22px; border-radius:10px; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.2s; white-space:nowrap;">Me avise →</button>
      </div>
      <p id="subscribeMsg" style="color:var(--accent); font-size:13px; margin-top:12px; display:none;">✓ Perfeito! Você será o primeiro a saber.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Features list -->
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:40px; margin-top:60px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;">
        <div style="width:20px; height:20px; background:rgba(34,211,238,0.15); border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;">
          <svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#22D3EE" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>
        </div>
        <span style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:13px;">100% gratuito</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;">
        <div style="width:20px; height:20px; background:rgba(34,211,238,0.15); border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;">
          <svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#22D3EE" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>
        </div>
        <span style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:13px;">Sem anúncios</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;">
        <div style="width:20px; height:20px; background:rgba(34,211,238,0.15); border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;">
          <svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#22D3EE" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>
        </div>
        <span style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:13px;">Dados protegidos</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <p>Feito com <strong>propósito</strong> por intercambistas brasileiros · <strong>Exchange</strong> © 2026</p>
  <p style="margin-top:6px; font-size:11px; opacity:0.5;">Explorar o mundo com segurança, organização e pertencimento.</p>
</footer>

<script>
  // Custom cursor
  const cursor = document.getElementById('cursor');
  const cursorRing = document.getElementById('cursorRing');
  let mx = 0, my = 0, rx = 0, ry = 0;

  document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    mx = e.clientX; my = e.clientY;
    cursor.style.left = mx - 5 + 'px';
    cursor.style.top = my - 5 + 'px';
  });

  function animateRing() {
    rx += (mx - rx - 18) * 0.12;
    ry += (my - ry - 18) * 0.12;
    cursorRing.style.left = rx + 'px';
    cursorRing.style.top = ry + 'px';
    requestAnimationFrame(animateRing);
  }
  animateRing();

  document.querySelectorAll('a, button, [style*="cursor: none"]').forEach(el => {
    el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
      cursor.style.transform = 'scale(2.5)';
      cursorRing.style.transform = 'scale(1.4)';
      cursorRing.style.opacity = '0.8';
    });
    el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      cursor.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
      cursorRing.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
      cursorRing.style.opacity = '0.5';
    });
  });

  // Nav scroll effect
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    document.getElementById('navbar').classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 20);
  });

  // Section navigation
  function showSection(id) {
    document.querySelectorAll('section').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a').forEach(a => a.classList.remove('active'));
    document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
    const navEl = document.getElementById('nav-' + id);
    if (navEl) navEl.classList.add('active');
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
    if (id === 'home') animateStats();
  }

  // Stats counter animation
  function animateCount(el, target, suffix = '') {
    let count = 0;
    const step = target / 60;
    const timer = setInterval(() => {
      count += step;
      if (count >= target) { count = target; clearInterval(timer); }
      el.textContent = Math.floor(count) + suffix;
    }, 20);
  }

  function animateStats() {
    setTimeout(() => {
      animateCount(document.getElementById('stat1'), 2400, '+');
      animateCount(document.getElementById('stat2'), 18, '+');
      animateCount(document.getElementById('stat3'), 34, '+');
    }, 600);
  }
  animateStats();

  // Particles
  const particlesContainer = document.getElementById('particles');
  for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
    const p = document.createElement('div');
    p.className = 'particle';
    p.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + '%';
    p.style.animationDelay = Math.random() * 8 + 's';
    p.style.animationDuration = (6 + Math.random() * 6) + 's';
    particlesContainer.appendChild(p);
  }

  // Email subscribe
  function handleSubscribe() {
    const input = document.getElementById('emailInput');
    const msg = document.getElementById('subscribeMsg');
    if (input.value && input.value.includes('@')) {
      msg.style.display = 'block';
      input.value = '';
      input.placeholder = 'Cadastrado!';
    }
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>
